INVALID_RESERVATION_DATES: Check-out date must be after check-in date.

STAY_ALREADY_COMPLETED: This stay has already been completed.
GUEST_NOT_FOUND: The specified guest could not be found.
INVALID_DOCUMENT: The provided identity document is invalid.

INVOICE_ALREADY_PAID: This invoice has already been paid.
INVOICE_NOT_ISSUED: This invoice has not yet been issued.

ORDER_NOT_FOUND: The restaurant order could not be found.
ITEM_NOT_FOUND: One or more menu items were not found.

VALIDATION_ERROR: There was an error validating your request data.
ROOM_TYPE_NOT_FOUND: The specified room type could not be found.
